description: Connections, per-secret usage, rejection rates, DC connectivity, and resource utilization for Teleproxy MTProxy.

panels.title: Uptime
panels.description: Time since proxy process started.

panels.title: Active Connections
panels.description: Current client, RPC, and total network connections.

panels.title: Connection Rate
panels.description: New client connections per second.

panels.title: Ready DC Targets
panels.description: Backend Telegram DC targets ready to accept traffic. Zero means no traffic can flow.

panels.title: Workers
panels.description: Number of active worker processes.

panels.title: Active Connections
panels.description: Current client, RPC, and total network connections.

panels.title: Connections by Secret
panels.description: Current connections broken down by configured secret label.

panels.title: Limits vs Usage
panels.description: Current connections vs configured limit per secret. Dashed lines show limits.

panels.title: Per-Secret Status
panels.description: Snapshot of per-secret connection counts, limits, and unique IP usage.

panels.title: Accepted vs Rejected
panels.description: Rate of accepted vs rejected connections over time.

panels.title: Rejections Breakdown
panels.description: Rejection rate broken down by cause: IP ACL, LRU, flood, per-secret limits.

panels.title: IP ACL Rejections (in time range)
panels.description: Total connections rejected by IP access control lists in the selected time range.

panels.title: Throughput by Secret
panels.description: Data transfer rate (bytes/sec) per secret, split by direction.

panels.title: Total Traffic by Secret
panels.description: Cumulative bytes transferred per secret over each rate interval.

panels.title: Query Pipeline
panels.description: Rate of client queries received, forwarded, dropped, and expired.

panels.title: Response Pipeline
panels.description: Rate of responses and ACKs forwarded or dropped.

panels.title: Errors
panels.description: Rate of proxy errors, transport errors, and dropped RPC answers.

panels.title: Direct DC Connections
panels.description: Active direct DC connections and rates of creation, failure, and retries.

panels.title: SOCKS5 Upstream
panels.description: SOCKS5 upstream proxy connect attempts, successes, and failures.

panels.title: PROXY Protocol
panels.description: PROXY protocol header parse rate and errors.

panels.title: Network Buffers
panels.description: Network buffer memory used vs allocated.

panels.title: Connection Slots
panels.description: Active vs allocated connection slots.

panels.title: DRS Delays
panels.description: Inter-record delays applied vs skipped during DPI resistance.

panels.title: Weibull Parameters
panels.description: Current Weibull distribution shape (k) and scale (lambda) for DRS timing.

title: Teleproxy
